simulation_settings._help_dates: Start/End define the full simulation window.
simulation_settings._help_rebalance_date: The date on which the major portfolio rebalance and cash funding event occurs.
simulation_settings._help_family_dates: Used to auto-calculate VA drop-offs (Child 18) and Nenkin relief (Age 60).
simulation_settings._help_fx: Initial USD/JPY rate. If set to 0, the script fetches the live rate.
simulation_settings._help_inflation: US CPI affects tax brackets and US COLA. Japan CPI affects your JPY expense budget.
simulation_settings._help_drift: If true, JPY strengthens by 'fx_drift_rate_annual' (simulating mean reversion).
simulation_settings._help_recession: If true, portfolio drops by 'recession_severity_pct' one month after retirement.
simulation_settings._help_scheduled_recessions: Dynamic recession list. Required: year (int), severity (0.0–1.0). Optional: duration_months (default 1 = single-shock), recovery_months (default 0 = no auto-recovery). e.g. [{"year": 2034, "severity": 0.35, "duration_months": 14, "recovery_months": 24}]
simulation_settings._help_fx_shocks: Discrete FX rate overrides. Sets USD/JPY to target_fx at the start of the given year (before that year's drift). Required: year (int), target_fx (float). Optional: description (string). e.g. [{"year": 2032, "target_fx": 80.0, "description": "2011-style yen surge"}]
simulation_settings._help_expenses: Base expenses in JPY. NHI, Resident Tax, and Nenkin are added ON TOP.
simulation_settings._help_nhi_spike: First 18-month NHI premium after retirement (high due to prior executive income). Can be adjusted for NHI income-spike effects.
simulation_settings._help_nenkin_rule: Total monthly Nenkin for the household (e.g. 35,020 JPY for two people).
simulation_settings._help_nenkin_baseline: Baseline Nenkin already in base_expense_jpy; only excess is a separate charge.
simulation_settings._help_growth: Manual annual growth rates per ticker. Set fetch_live_growth_rates=true to override with 10-year historical CAGR from Yahoo Finance (falls back to 7% on failure).
simulation_settings._help_monthly_contribution_ticker: Ticker to buy with monthly VA-buffer contributions during accumulation.
simulation_settings._help_salary: Annual gross compensation (USD) used to calculate marginal tax on RSUs/Dividends pre-retirement.
simulation_settings._help_va_buffer: Amount subtracted from monthly VA payment to determine contribution amount.
simulation_settings._help_buy_schd: If true, switches contributions and dividends to SCHD for the last 12 months before retirement.
simulation_settings._help_rsu_tax: Options: 'SALARY' (taxes paid from external cash) or 'SELL_TO_COVER' (sells vested shares to cover tax).
simulation_settings._help_gross_inc: Total income in retirement year (Salary + Bonus). Used to calc Year 1 Resident Tax.
simulation_settings._help_va_profile: VA Disability Profile uses 2026 official rates. Rating must be a multiple of 10 (0–100). Dependent status: 'vet_only', 'with_spouse', 'with_spouse_and_child'. Set rating=0 to fall back to legacy va_disability_rates map.

va_disability_rates._help: Legacy VA monthly payments per year (used only when va_disability_rating=0). Latest year used as baseline for future projections. Set base=0 to ignore.

simulation_settings._help_fers: FERS pension start: either specify 'fers_start_date' (YYYY-MM-DD) or 'fers_start_age' (integer). Simulation bridges cashflow until FERS kicks in.
simulation_settings._help_ss: US Social Security (Totalization Pillar). Taxable as ordinary income under the US Savings Clause. Set to 0 to disable.
simulation_settings._help_nenkin: Japanese Nenkin income (Totalization Pillar). Taxed in Japan; FTC credited against US liability. Set to 0 to disable.
simulation_settings._help_war_chest: Emergency fund kept in cash. Script refills this from portfolio if it drops.
simulation_settings._help_war_chest_enabled: Set to false to skip war chest funding entirely.
simulation_settings._help_war_chest_funding_timing: When to build the war chest. Options: 'at_retirement' (sell shares on retirement date) or 'gradually_before_retirement' (divert monthly income during ramp period).
simulation_settings._help_bridge: Cash buffer for the first 1-2 years before pensions kick in.
simulation_settings._help_bridge_fund_enabled: Set to false to skip bridge fund funding entirely.
simulation_settings._help_bridge_fund_funding_timing: When to build the bridge fund. Options: same as war chest.
simulation_settings._help_tax_prep: Cash set aside specifically for the massive Year 1 tax bills.
simulation_settings._help_rebalance: Target allocation for portfolios. Taxable rebalances at retirement. Roth rebalances at age 59.5.
simulation_settings._help_location: Prefecture and city determine the resident tax (住民税) rate. Standard 10%. Exception: Nagoya City (Aichi) = 9.7%.
simulation_settings._help_us_tax_strategy: US expat tax optimization. Options: 'ftc_only' (Foreign Tax Credit only) or 'feie_and_ftc' (FEIE up to $126,500 exclusion + FTC on excess). Simulation picks the lower-tax result.
simulation_settings._help_jurisdiction: Controls which tax systems are active. Options: 'both', 'us_only', 'japan_only'.
simulation_settings._help_investment_location: Primary domicile of the investment portfolio. Options: 'us', 'japan', 'international'.
simulation_settings._help_filing_status: IRS filing status. Options: 'Married Filing Jointly', 'Single', 'Married Filing Separately', 'Head of Household'. Determines brackets, std deduction, and LTCG thresholds.
simulation_settings._help_state: Two-letter US state code for state income tax. 'None' = no state tax. Rate auto-derived from code; override with 'us_state_tax_rate'.
simulation_settings._help_waterfall: Cashflow withdrawal strategy. 'defensive' (default, V7.1): JPY-first 8-tier waterfall with FX spread penalty. 'cautious' (V7.0 backward-compat): USD-first with WC top-up.
simulation_settings._help_fx_spread_penalty: FX conversion spread cost (bid-ask) applied on all USD→JPY conversions in the waterfall (Tiers 4, 5, 6, 8). Default 0.005 = 0.5%.

rsu_awards._comment: Single RSU grant. Add multiple entries for multiple awards.
rsu_awards._help_vesting_start_date: Optional. If set, vesting year-clock starts from this date instead of grant_date (e.g., for cliff-then-vest grants).
rsu_awards._help_cadence: Options: 'quarterly' (default, Feb/May/Aug/Nov), 'monthly' (12x/year), 'annually' (1x/year). Ignored if vesting_months is set.
rsu_awards._help_months: Explicit list of vesting months (1-12). Leave empty [] to use vesting_cadence default.

rsu_awards._comment: Second RSU grant example — monthly cadence with vesting_start_date.

market_prices_usd._help: Manual price overrides. Set to 0 to use fallback prices.

_help_brokerage_accounts: Additional named brokerage accounts beyond the primary 'taxable'. Each can have its own tax_jurisdiction (us/japan/both/none) and location.

brokerage_accounts._comment: Example additional brokerage account. Remove or leave empty if not needed.
brokerage_accounts.name: Fidelity

holdings._comment_dividend_rules: Per-asset dividend control. 'drip_enabled': false = no DRIP. 'dividend_reinvest_target': ticker to reinvest into. 'custom_growth_rate': override annual growth rate. 'dividend_months': months in which dividends fire (e.g. [3,6,9,12] = quarterly). 'dividend_currency': 'usd' (default) or 'jpy' — determines which bucket receives net income (JPY dividends skip USD→JPY FX conversion).

roth_ira._comment: Roth IRA: US tax-free on gains. In Both-jurisdiction mode, Japan resident tax may still apply to Roth distributions.

japan_dc._comment: Defined Contribution (iDeCo/Corporate DC). Japan jurisdiction. growth_rate overrides the DC fund CAGR.
